texto: Go and find what it is that inspires you, go and find what it is that you love and go do that until it hurts. Don’t quit, and don’t give up. The reward is just around the corner. And in times of doubt or times of joy, listen for that still, small voice. Know that God has been there from the beginning—and he will be there until the End.
explicacao: Citação de Chip & Joanna Gaines sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Go and find what it is that inspires you, go and find what it is that you love and go do that unt…” articula fe, faith, inspiracional em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.
